name: @vaipakam/lib
description: Framework-agnostic shared utilities consumed by every app in the monorepo (apps/defi, apps/www, apps/agent, apps/indexer, apps/keeper). Stage 2a scope: multicall (viem helpers), decodeContractError (error normaliser), chainPlatforms (chainId → CoinGecko platform slug), canonicalAssets (per-chain ERC-20 lists), crossDomainPref (parent-domain cookie helper for theme + language sync between defi.vaipakam.com and www.vaipakam.com). format + journeyLog are deferred until their Vite-coupled deps (i18n, contracts/config) are extracted.
